message:
chore(deps): switch asupersync + ftui from local paths to crates.io

Update Cargo.lock to resolve asupersync 0.2.6, franken-decision 0.2.6,
franken-evidence 0.2.6, franken-kernel 0.2.6, and ftui 0.2.1 (plus all
ftui-* subcrates) from crates.io registry instead of local path
dependencies. Also transitions from bincode 1.x to bincode-next 2.1
with its derive and unty-next transitive dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
